programme.desc: S1 , E541 : Lakshmi is a brave woman in a traditional family. Her husband, Shriniwas, wants to build his dream house. Lakshmi supports him and faces challenges with strength.

programme.title: Tula Japnar Aahe
programme.desc: S1 , E470 : Atharva and Veda are heartbroken by Ambika's death. Ambika's love for Veda is so strong that her spirit returns. She protects Veda from beyond.

programme.title: Patanjali Yog - By Yogrishi Swami Ramdev
programme.desc: S1 , E502 : Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.

programme.title: Sultan: The Saviour
programme.desc: Raja Dutta and his sister Disha move to Kolkata to start afresh. But Disha is oblivious to Raja's past and his intention behind shifting to Kolkata.

programme.title: Sakaler Sure
programme.desc: S1 , E729 : Talented singers and artists perform some of the most popular devotional and folk songs of Bengali music and enthral the audience with their performance.

programme.title: Tor Naam
programme.desc: Tor Naam is a sweet teenage love story which begins in a boarding school in Sikkim and ends with an interesting twist.

programme.title: Sindoor Niye Khela
programme.desc: Varsha is a powerful businesswoman, but faces opposition from her workers. In order to solve the problem, she marries the leader of the workers' union.

programme.title: Satyam Shivam Sundaram
programme.desc: Laxmi, a milkmaid, falls in love with Kanchan, an influential zamindar's son. Things take a tragic turn when his family disapproves of their alliance.

programme.title: Ekai Eksho
programme.desc: Ratan, an honest autorickshaw driver, refuses to help a corrupt politician, Pradip Roy, which then leads to a local war. He also ends up falling in love with Jhilik, his daughter.

programme.title: Sathihara
programme.desc: Musicians Anuradha and Jeet fall in love and marry, but their relationship is tested when Anuradha's thriving career begins to overshadow Jeet's ambitions.

programme.title: Ogo Bodhu Shundori
programme.desc: Tensions rise between a married couple with conflicting personalities as the husband offers shelter to a woman in their home.

programme.title: Jamalaye Jibonto Bhanu
programme.desc: Bhanu lands in the afterlife causing chaos among divine beings, blending humor and satire as gods struggle to handle his antics.

programme.title: Teen Yari Katha
programme.desc: Three close friends sharing a home in the suburbs of Kolkata find themselves falling for different women. Determined to win their hearts, they embark on a journey filled with love and challenges.

programme.title: Patanjali Yog - By Yogrishi Swami Ramdev
programme.desc: S1 , E503 : Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.

programme.title: Dark Chocolate
programme.desc: This thriller murder mystery is an adaptation of the real life murder case of Sheena Bora. The discovery of a charred corpse in the woods, leads to a high-profile murder investigation.

programme.title: Krrish
programme.desc: After discovering his father's truth, Krrish must reveal his superpowers to the world and becomes the masked superhero.

programme.title: Kaagaz
programme.desc: Bharat Lal Bihari is falsely declared dead by the government. However, he puts up a struggle in order to prove his existence.

programme.title: Tarla
programme.desc: Seeking to achieve something significant in life, Tarla Dalal rebels against societal expectations to empower herself and other women through the art of cooking.

programme.title: Jolly LLB 2
programme.desc: A lawyer hoodwinks a woman to start his own law firm. However, he feels guilty and tries to make things right when he finds out that she commits suicide for failing to get justice for her husband.

programme.title: Pink
programme.desc: After being molested, Minal, along with her friends, tries to file an FIR against a politician's nephew. When the subsequent case gets rigged, Deepak, a retired lawyer, helps them to fight the case.

programme.title: Kabali
programme.desc: When Kabali raises his voice against the oppression faced by Tamil labourers in Malaysia, he is imprisoned for 25 years. After being released, he seeks revenge on the ones who wronged him.

programme.title: Govinda Naam Mera
programme.desc: Govinda Waghmare, who is stuck with his controlling wife, seeks love from his gorgeous girlfriend which leads him into a chaotic situation.

programme.title: Dabangg
programme.desc: Chulbul Pandey, a police officer, battles a corrupt political leader, Cheddi Singh, who strains Chulbul's relationship with his step-brother.

programme.title: Sarfira
programme.desc: A determined young man sets out to fulfil his ambition of starting a low-cost airline. However, he soon finds himself embroiled in a high-stakes game of nefarious rivalry and bureaucracy.

programme.title: Omkara
programme.desc: Ishwar dreams of becoming Omkara's successor after the latter wins the election. However, when Omkara appoints Keshav as his lieutenant, he feels betrayed and plots revenge.

programme.title: Dark Chocolate
programme.desc: This thriller murder mystery is an adaptation of the real life murder case of Sheena Bora. The discovery of a charred corpse in the woods, leads to a high-profile murder investigation.
